original_image_tags: A single sheet of white paper with handwritten text in cursive script, divided into two columns by a central fold. Three black punched holes are visible along the top edge. The handwriting is in dark ink. There are several strikethroughs and corrections in the right column.

elements.description: A page containing handwritten text in cursive ink, divided into two columns, with visible hole punch marks at the top. There are crossed-out words and insertions within the text. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other visual elements are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only handwritten cursive text in two columns with hole punches and strikethroughs, and neither quotes any specific text inside the images.
